rawAssistant: A cloak isn't ideal for an east wind, especially with soot in the air. Consider a longer coat with some water resistance; those are staples of our travels here in Hollowfen. I've got just the thing – stitched coats made from durable fabric that'll keep you dry and warm on your journey.
